/workspace/host-tools/gcc/riscv64-linux-musl-x86_64/bin/riscv64-unknown-linux-musl-g++ CMakeFiles/app_decode_rtsp.dir/hw_decode.cc.o -o app_decode_rtsp   -L/workspace/ffmpeg_libs_n4.4.4.2/lib  -L/workspace/libav-decoder/cvi_mpi/lib  -L/workspace/libav-decoder/cvi_mpi/lib/3rd  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/ffmpeg_libs_n4.4.4.2/lib:/workspace/libav-decoder/cvi_mpi/lib:/workspace/libav-decoder/cvi_mpi/lib/3rd:/workspace/libav-decoder/build/gvision ../gvision/libgvision.so -lsys -lvdec /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_core.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_features2d.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_highgui.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_imgproc.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_photo.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_video.a -lavcodec -lavformat -lavutil -lswscale -lswresample -lsbc /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_imgproc.a /workspace/opencv-mobile-4.10.0-licheerv-nano/lib/libopencv_core.a -ldl -lm -lrt  -latomic
